mute.name: Заглушить видео
mute.metaTitle: Заглушить видео — Удаление звука из видео онлайн
mute.metaDescription: Удаляйте звуковую дорожку из видеофайлов. Быстрая обработка, без загрузки. Бесплатный онлайн-инструмент.
mute.keywords: заглушить видео, удалить звук из видео, беззвучное видео, видео без звука
mute.unsupported: Для этого инструмента требуется поддержка SharedArrayBuffer. Используйте современный браузер с HTTPS.

faq.q1: Как работает удаление звука из видео?
faq.a1: Инструмент удаляет звуковую дорожку из видео, сохраняя качество видео. Перекодирование не требуется.
faq.a2: Поддерживаются большинство распространённых форматов, включая MP4, WebM, MOV и AVI.
faq.q3: Will my files be uploaded to a server?
faq.a3: Нет. Вся обработка происходит полностью в вашем браузере. Ваши данные никогда не покидают ваше устройство — ничего не загружается на сервер.
faq.q4: Can I use this tool offline?
faq.a4: Yes. Once the page has loaded, the tool works completely offline. For the best experience, install PrivaDeck as a PWA from your browser.
faq.a5: There are no server-imposed limits. The maximum file size depends on your device's available memory and browser capabilities. Most modern devices handle files up to several hundred MB without issues.

intro.title: Что такое Mute Video?
intro.content:
Mute Video removes the audio track from video files while keeping the video quality intact. Create silent versions of videos for background loops, presentations, or social media posts where audio isn't needed.

Powered by FFmpeg.wasm — full video processing running locally in your browser.

howToUse.title: Как использовать Mute Video
howToUse.content:
1. Upload a video file (MP4, WebM, MKV, AVI supported)
  2. Click Mute to remove the audio track
  3. Download the silent video

The video stream is copied without re-encoding, so processing is fast and quality is preserved.

features.title: Ключевые функции
features.content:
• Audio Track Removal: Completely strips audio while keeping video untouched
  • No Re-encoding: Video stream is copied directly — no quality loss
  • Fast Processing: Stream copy is much faster than re-encoding
  • Multiple Formats: Supports MP4, WebM, MKV, and AVI input
  • Powered by FFmpeg.wasm: Industry-standard video processing in your browser
  • Preview: Play the video before and after muting

useCases.title: Типичные варианты использования
useCases.content:
• Presentations: Remove distracting audio from background videos in slides
  • Social Media: Create silent looping videos for Instagram or TikTok backgrounds
  • Web Design: Prepare silent hero videos for website backgrounds
  • Privacy: Remove conversations or identifiable audio from recordings
  • Video Editing: Strip audio before replacing with a different soundtrack

privacy.title: Обработка с защитой конфиденциальности Video Processing
privacy.content:
Video processing runs entirely in your browser using FFmpeg.wasm (WebAssembly).

  • Your videos never leave your device — no server uploads
  • No cloud processing or third-party access to your media
  • Работает в автономном режиме после FFmpeg core is loaded

intro.title: Что такое Trim Video?
intro.content:
Trim Video cuts video clips to your desired length with precise start and end time controls. Set times down to 0.1-second precision, preview the selection, and download the trimmed clip.

Uses FFmpeg.wasm for professional-grade video trimming прямо в вашем браузере.

howToUse.title: Как использовать Trim Video
howToUse.content:
1. Upload a video file
  2. Set the start time and end time for the clip you want to keep
  3. Preview the selected range in the video player
  4. Click Trim to extract the clip
  5. Download the trimmed video

Supports precise time selection with 0.1-second increments.

features.title: Ключевые функции
features.content:
• Precise Timing: Set start and end times with 0.1-second accuracy
  • Video Preview: Play the selected range before trimming
  • Fast Processing: Stream copy mode for instant trimming without re-encoding
  • Multiple Formats: Supports MP4, WebM, MKV, and AVI
  • Powered by FFmpeg.wasm: Professional video processing in the browser
  • Quality Preservation: No quality loss when stream copying

useCases.title: Типичные варианты использования
useCases.content:
• Social Media Clips: Cut highlights from longer videos for social platforms
  • Meeting Recordings: Extract key moments from recorded meetings
  • Content Creation: Trim raw footage to create polished clips
  • Presentations: Cut video clips to exact lengths for presentations
  • Personal Videos: Trim home videos to keep the best moments

privacy.title: Обработка с защитой конфиденциальности Video Trimming
privacy.content:
Video trimming runs entirely in your browser using FFmpeg.wasm.

  • Your videos never leave your device
  • No server uploads — your personal and business videos stay private
  • Работает в автономном режиме после FFmpeg core is loaded

intro.title: Что такое Rotate Video?
intro.content: Rotate Video rotates video files by 90°, 180°, or 270° to fix orientation issues. Correct sideways phone videos, fix upside-down recordings, or adjust orientation for specific display needs.

howToUse.title: Как использовать Rotate Video
howToUse.content:
1. Upload a video file
  2. Select the rotation angle: 90°, 180°, or 270°
  3. Click Rotate to process
  4. Download the rotated video

features.title: Ключевые функции
features.content:

  • Video Preview: See the video before and after rotation
  • Multiple Formats: Supports MP4, WebM, MKV, and AVI
  • Powered by FFmpeg.wasm: Professional video processing in the browser
  • Quality Output: High-quality rotation with FFmpeg encoding

intro.title: Что такое Video to GIF?
intro.content:
Video to GIF converts video clips into animated GIF images with control over frame rate, resolution, and quality. Create shareable GIFs from any video for social media, chat, or documentation.

Powered by FFmpeg.wasm for high-quality GIF generation прямо в вашем браузере.

howToUse.title: Как использовать Video to GIF
howToUse.content:
1. Upload a video file
  2. Set the start and end time for the GIF clip
  3. Adjust frame rate (fps) and output width
  4. Click Convert to generate the GIF
  5. Preview and download the animated GIF

Lower frame rates and smaller widths produce smaller GIF files.

features.title: Ключевые функции
features.content:
• Frame Rate Control: Set GIF frame rate (e.g., 10, 15, 24 fps)
  • Size Control: Adjust output width for file size optimization
  • Time Selection: Choose which part of the video to convert
  • Preview: See the GIF before downloading
  • Powered by FFmpeg.wasm: High-quality palette generation for optimal GIF colors
  • Multiple Input Formats: Convert from MP4, WebM, MKV, AVI

useCases.title: Типичные варианты использования
useCases.content:
• Social Media: Create reaction GIFs or highlights from videos
  • Documentation: Create animated demonstrations for tutorials or docs
  • Chat & Messaging: Make custom GIFs for group chats and Slack
  • Bug Reports: Record and share animated bug reproductions
  • Marketing: Create eye-catching animated content for campaigns

privacy.title: Обработка с защитой конфиденциальности GIF Creation
privacy.content:
GIF conversion runs entirely in your browser using FFmpeg.wasm.

  • Your videos never leave your device
  • No server processing — your content stays private
  • Работает в автономном режиме после FFmpeg core is loaded

intro.title: Что такое Video to WebP?
intro.content:
Video to WebP converts video clips into animated WebP images. WebP animations are 25-35% smaller than equivalent GIFs with better color reproduction and transparency support.

The modern alternative to GIFs for web use.

howToUse.title: Как использовать Video to WebP
howToUse.content:
1. Upload a video file
  2. Set the start and end time for the animation clip
  3. Adjust frame rate and output dimensions
  4. Click Convert to generate the animated WebP
  5. Download the WebP animation

features.title: Ключевые функции
features.content:
• Smaller Than GIF: WebP animations are 25-35% smaller than equivalent GIFs
  • Better Colors: Full 24-bit color depth (vs. GIF's 256 color limit)
  • Transparency: Alpha channel support for transparent animations
  • Frame Rate Control: Adjustable fps for size optimization
  • Powered by FFmpeg.wasm: Professional encoding in the browser
  • Wide Browser Support: Supported by all modern browsers

useCases.title: Типичные варианты использования
useCases.content:
• Web Performance: Replace GIFs with smaller WebP animations on websites
  • Chat Apps: Create animated stickers and reactions
  • Documentation: Smaller animated demos for technical documentation
  • Social Media: Create animated content where WebP is supported
  • App Design: Create loading animations and micro-interactions

privacy.title: Обработка с защитой конфиденциальности Video Conversion
privacy.content:
WebP conversion runs entirely in your browser using FFmpeg.wasm.

  • Your videos never leave your device
  • No server processing or uploads
  • Работает в автономном режиме после FFmpeg core is loaded

compress.name: Сжать видео
compress.description: Уменьшайте размер видеофайлов с настраиваемыми уровнями качества.
compress.metaDescription: Сжимайте видеофайлы для уменьшения размера. Выбирайте высокое, среднее или низкое качество. Бесплатный онлайн-инструмент, без загрузки.
compress.keywords: сжать видео, компрессор видео, уменьшить размер видео, сжатие видео

faq.a1: Инструмент перекодирует видео с помощью H.264 с параметром CRF (Constant Rate Factor). Более высокое качество означает большие файлы; более низкое — меньшие файлы с большими артефактами сжатия.
faq.a2: Сжатые видео всегда выводятся в формате MP4 (H.264 видео + AAC аудио) для максимальной совместимости.
faq.q3: Will my files be uploaded to a server?
faq.a3: Нет. Вся обработка происходит полностью в вашем браузере. Ваши данные никогда не покидают ваше устройство — ничего не загружается на сервер.

faq.a4: Yes. Once the page has loaded, the tool works completely offline. For the best experience, install PrivaDeck as a PWA from your browser.
faq.a5: There are no server-imposed limits. The maximum file size depends on your device's available memory and browser capabilities. Most modern devices handle files up to several hundred MB without issues.

intro.title: Что такое Compress Video?
intro.content:
Compress Video reduces video file size with selectable quality presets. Choose High, Medium, or Low quality to balance file size against visual quality — perfect for sharing videos via email or messaging apps.

Uses FFmpeg.wasm with H.264 encoding for maximum compatibility.

howToUse.title: Как использовать Compress Video
howToUse.content:
1. Upload a video file
  2. Select compression level: High Quality (larger), Medium, or Low Quality (smallest)
  3. Click Compress to start processing
  4. See file size comparison and download the compressed video

Processing time depends on video length and your device performance.

features.title: Ключевые функции
features.content:
• Three Quality Levels: High, Medium, and Low compression presets
  • Size Comparison: See original vs. compressed file sizes
  • H.264 Encoding: Maximum compatibility across devices and platforms
  • Powered by FFmpeg.wasm: Professional-grade video encoding in the browser
  • Multiple Input Formats: Compress MP4, WebM, MKV, and AVI files
  • Preview: Play the compressed video before downloading

useCases.title: Типичные варианты использования
useCases.content:
• Email: Reduce video size to fit email attachment limits
  • Messaging: Compress videos for WhatsApp, Telegram, or iMessage sharing
  • Storage: Save device storage by compressing large video files
  • Web Upload: Meet upload size limits for websites and portals
  • Social Media: Compress for faster uploads to social platforms

privacy.title: Обработка с защитой конфиденциальности Video Compression

  • Your videos never leave your device — no server uploads
  • No cloud processing or third-party access
  • Работает в автономном режиме после FFmpeg core is loaded

faq.a1: Вы можете конвертировать между форматами MP4, WebM, MKV и AVI. MP4 и AVI используют кодировку H.264, WebM — VP9, MKV — копирование потока для быстрой конвертации.
faq.a2: Конвертация в MKV использует копирование потока, поэтому качество сохраняется полностью. Другие конвертации перекодируют с высоким качеством.

intro.title: Что такое Convert Video Format?
intro.content:
Convert Video Format transforms videos between popular formats: MP4, WebM, MKV, and AVI. Need to convert a WebM recording to MP4 for wider compatibility? Or an AVI to WebM for web use? This tool handles it.

Powered by FFmpeg.wasm for reliable format conversion in your browser.

howToUse.title: Как использовать Convert Video Format
howToUse.content:
1. Upload a video file in any supported format
  2. Select the target format: MP4, WebM, MKV, or AVI
  3. Click Convert to start processing
  4. Download the converted video

MP4 (H.264) is recommended for maximum compatibility across devices and platforms.

features.title: Ключевые функции
features.content:
• Four Formats: Convert between MP4, WebM, MKV, and AVI
  • H.264 Encoding: MP4 output uses H.264 for universal compatibility
  • VP8/VP9 for WebM: Proper codec selection for each format
  • Powered by FFmpeg.wasm: Professional encoding in the browser
  • Preview: Play the converted video before downloading
  • Audio Preservation: Audio track is properly transcoded

useCases.title: Типичные варианты использования
useCases.content:
• Compatibility: Convert WebM screen recordings to universally playable MP4
  • Web Optimization: Convert videos to WebM for smaller file sizes on the web
  • Legacy Support: Convert modern formats to AVI for older media players
  • Editing: Convert to a format your video editor supports
  • Cross-Platform: Ensure videos play on any device or platform

privacy.title: Обработка с защитой конфиденциальности Video Conversion
privacy.content:
Format conversion runs entirely in your browser using FFmpeg.wasm.

  • Your videos never leave your device
  • No server processing or cloud encoding
  • Работает в автономном режиме после FFmpeg core is loaded

intro.title: Что такое Resize Video?
intro.content: Resize Video changes video resolution with preset options (720p, 480p, 360p) or custom dimensions. Downscale large videos for web, mobile, or social media, or adjust resolution for specific platform requirements.

howToUse.title: Как использовать Resize Video
howToUse.content:
1. Upload a video file
  2. Select a preset resolution (720p, 480p, 360p) or enter custom dimensions
  3. Click Resize to process
  4. Download the resized video

Aspect ratio is maintained automatically to prevent distortion.

features.title: Ключевые функции
features.content:
• Preset Resolutions: Quick-select 720p, 480p, or 360p
  • Custom Dimensions: Enter specific width and height
  • Aspect Ratio Lock: Automatically maintains video proportions
  • Powered by FFmpeg.wasm: Professional-grade video scaling
  • Multiple Formats: Resize MP4, WebM, MKV, and AVI
  • Preview: Play the resized video before downloading

useCases.title: Типичные варианты использования
useCases.content:
• Social Media: Resize for Instagram, TikTok, or YouTube requirements
  • Mobile Optimization: Downscale 4K/1080p videos for mobile viewing
  • Web Embedding: Resize for optimal web player dimensions
  • Storage Savings: Reduce resolution to save storage space
  • Email: Downscale videos for email-friendly file sizes

privacy.title: Обработка с защитой конфиденциальности Video Resizing
privacy.content:
Video resizing runs entirely in your browser using FFmpeg.wasm.

  • Your videos never leave your device
  • No server processing or uploads
  • Работает в автономном режиме после FFmpeg core is loaded
